title: Privacy Policy
use_when: Use when drafting or updating a privacy policy for a product, launch, website, app, or customer-facing workflow.
do_not_use_when: Do not use as legal advice, for final compliance sign-off, or when regulatory obligations must be determined by counsel.
output_artifact: Privacy policy draft for legal review with data practices, assumptions, and compliance flags
framework_fit: Best for producing a clear product/data collection draft that a legal reviewer can validate before launch.
failure_modes: Produces Privacy policy draft for legal review with data practices, assumptions, and compliance flags without tying recommendations to the user's Launch & Learn stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Privacy Policy as generic Operations advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Privacy Policy when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.

examples.prompt: Use $privacy-policy to turn this data-collection context into a decision-ready Privacy policy draft for legal review with data practices, assumptions, and compliance flags.
examples.expected_artifact: Privacy policy draft for legal review with data practices, assumptions, and compliance flags
